title: Hunamy About Us - Variant 3
prompt:
Title: Hunamy About Us - Variant 3
Context: Redesign of the 'Sobre N├│s' (About Us) page for Hunamy, a marketing agency focused on human creativity powered by AI. Theme: Modern, futuristic, dark mode with indigo gradients.
Description of the screen: Desktop 'About Us' page for Hunamy, variant 3 of 3. 
1. Hero Section: Minimalist and spacious. Centered white text on a deep indigo gradient background that pulses slowly.
2. Split-Screen Story: Left side features the text 'Nossa Hist├│ria', right side shows a high-quality abstract image representing 'Humanity + Tech'.
3. Identity Grid: A sophisticated bento-box style layout for Purpose, Vision, and Mission, using different shades of dark gray and indigo to create depth.
4. Values: Icons are replaced by large, bold numbers or symbols, creating a very modern, editorial look.
5. Manifesto: Large typography that takes up the full width of the screen, creating a powerful statement.
Design style: Sophisticated, editorial, and minimalist. Focuses on clarity and high-end brand positioning.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
